property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.14 in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\allure-2.39.0 in;C:\Users
dabe\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Users
dabe\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\;C:\Users
dabe\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users
dabe\AppData\Roaming
pm;.

testcase.name: userRegistration
testcase.system-out:
Email: spare@admin.com, Password: @12345678 Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/register Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Ndabe", "lastName": "Mazii", "password": "Mazii@053103", "groupId": "1deae17a-c67a-4bb0-bdeb-df0fc9e2e526", "confirmPassword": "Mazii@053103", "email": "viola.keeling@yahoo.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 302 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:07 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "Registration submitted successfully. Your account is pending admin approval.", "data": { "id": "964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba", "firstName": "Ndabe", "lastName": "Mazii", "email": "viola.keeling@yahoo.com", "groupId": "1deae17a-c67a-4bb0-bdeb-df0fc9e2e526", "groupName": "Group A", "approvalStatus": "pending", "createdAt": "2026-04-19T10:10:07.000Z" } }
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.

testcase.name: adminLoginTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "@12345678", "email": "spare@admin.com" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 512 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:09 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "Login successful", "data": { "user": { "id": "07a9d666-9f14-49b9-92fb-6b0dab9900b6", "firstName": "John", "lastName": "smith", "email": "spare@admin.com", "role": "admin", "groupId": "5328c91e-fc40-11f0-8e00-5000e6331276", "groupName": "1st Group 2026", "approvalStatus": "approved", "createdAt": "2026-03-16 16:15:58", "updatedAt": "2026-04-19 10:06:07" }, "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjU4NjIwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjcyNjA5fQ.4PCzxNBDskTLptnXHVRS0PqMWJSuCgTE5emB1jLMV9c" } }

testcase.name: approveUserRegistration
testcase.system-out:
Request method: PUT Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba/approve Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjU4NjIwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjcyNjA5fQ.4PCzxNBDskTLptnXHVRS0PqMWJSuCgTE5emB1jLMV9c Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 193 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:14 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "User approved successfully", "data": { "id": "964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba", "firstName": "Ndabe", "lastName": "Mazii", "email": "viola.keeling@yahoo.com", "approvalStatus": "approved" } }

testcase.name: makeUserAdmin
testcase.system-out:
Request method: PUT Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba/role Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjU4NjIwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjcyNjA5fQ.4PCzxNBDskTLptnXHVRS0PqMWJSuCgTE5emB1jLMV9c Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "role": "admin" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 142 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:20 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "User role updated successfully", "data": { "id": "964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba", "role": "admin" } }

testcase.name: userLoginTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "Mazii@053103", "email": "viola.keeling@yahoo.com" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 511 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:24 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"

testcase.name: verifyUserIsAdmin
testcase.system-out:
Request method: GET Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiI5NjRiZTJkYi1kYTEyLTQ4ZGUtYTM1Mi1mNWEzNTllZmVkYmEiLCJlbWFpbCI6InZpb2xhLmtlZWxpbmdAeWFob28uY29tIiwicm9sZSI6ImFkbWluIiwiaWF0IjoxNzc2NTg2MjI0LCJleHAiOjE3NzY2NzI2MjR9.wv9b57HvGzAZ7BRcvnZ6BoVQ9ZZ7RSmUbrNihKK4bwU Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 319 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:28 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "User retrieved successfully", "data": { "Id": "964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba", "FirstName": "Ndabe", "LastName": "Mazii", "Email": "viola.keeling@yahoo.com", "Role": "admin", "IsActive": 1, "EmailVerified": 0, "ProfileImage": null, "CreatedAt": "2026-04-19 10:10:07", "UpdatedAt": "2026-04-19 10:10:24", "LastLoginAt": "2026-04-19 10:10:24", "stats": { "testimonialCount": 0, "taskCount": 0, "enrollmentCount": 0 } } }

testcase.name: loginAsAdmin
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "@12345678", "email": "spare@admin.com" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 508 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:29 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"

testcase.name: deleteUserTest
testcase.system-out:
Request method: DELETE Request URI: https://ndosiautomation.co.za/APIDEV/admin/users/964be2db-da12-48de-a352-f5a359efedba Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Authorization=Bearer eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJ1c2VySWQiOiIwN2E5ZDY2Ni05ZjE0LTQ5YjktOTJmYi02YjBkYWI5OTAwYjYiLCJlbWFpbCI6InNwYXJlQGFkbWluLmNvbSIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjU4NjIyOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc2NjcyNjI5fQ.2xS0lX-kbYN8jy0GekskRNgXwobRT2erEOOEHEZ81QI Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "status": "deleted" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Connection: Keep-Alive Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, Authorization, X-Requested-With Access-Control-Max-Age: 3600 Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0 Cache-Control: post-check=0,pre-check=0 Pragma: no-cache Expires: Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 GMT Content-Length: 78 Content-Encoding: gzip Vary: Accept-Encoding Date: Sun, 19 Apr 2026 08:10:29 GMT Server: LiteSpeed X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-29=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q050=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q046=":443"; ma=2592000, h3-Q043=":443"; ma=2592000, quic=":443"; ma=2592000; v="43,46"
{ "success": true, "message": "User deleted successfully" }
